001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.controller;
002
003import android.os.Bundle;
004import android.widget.Toast;
005import androidx.annotation.NonNull;
006import androidx.annotation.Nullable;
007import androidx.lifecycle.ViewModelProvider;
008import androidx.navigation.NavOptions;
009import androidx.navigation.fragment.NavHostFragment;
010import androidx.preference.EditTextPreference;
011import androidx.preference.Preference;
012import androidx.preference.PreferenceFragmentCompat;
013import dagger.hilt.android.AndroidEntryPoint;
014import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.R;
015import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.viewmodel.SignInViewModel;
016
017@AndroidEntryPoint
018public class SettingsFragment extends PreferenceFragmentCompat {
019
020  private static final String KEY_DEFAULT_TARGET_TEMP = "pref_default_target_temp";
021  private static final String KEY_DEFAULT_TARGET_HUMIDITY = "pref_default_target_humidity";
022  private static final String KEY_EXPORT_BATCH_CSV = "pref_export_batch_csv";
023  private static final String KEY_SIGN_OUT = "pref_sign_out";
024
025  private SignInViewModel signInViewModel;
026
027  @Override
028  public void onCreatePreferences(@Nullable Bundle savedInstanceState, @Nullable String rootKey) {
029    setPreferencesFromResource(R.xml.root_preferences, rootKey);
030
031    EditTextPreference defaultTempPreference = findPreference(KEY_DEFAULT_TARGET_TEMP);
032    EditTextPreference defaultHumidityPreference = findPreference(KEY_DEFAULT_TARGET_HUMIDITY);
033    Preference exportPreference = findPreference(KEY_EXPORT_BATCH_CSV);
034    Preference signOutPreference = findPreference(KEY_SIGN_OUT);
035
036    if (defaultTempPreference != null) {
037      defaultTempPreference.setOnPreferenceChangeListener((preference, newValue) ->
038          isValidTemperature(newValue)
039      );
040    }
041
042    if (defaultHumidityPreference != null) {
043      defaultHumidityPreference.setOnPreferenceChangeListener((preference, newValue) ->
044          isValidHumidity(newValue)
045      );
046    }
047
048    if (exportPreference != null) {
049      exportPreference.setOnPreferenceClickListener((preference) -> {
050        Toast.makeText(requireContext(), R.string.message_export_csv_placeholder, Toast.LENGTH_SHORT)
051            .show();
052        return true;
053      });
054    }
055
056    if (signOutPreference != null) {
057      signOutPreference.setOnPreferenceClickListener((preference) -> {
058        if (signInViewModel != null) {
059          signInViewModel.signOut();
060        }
061        return true;
062      });
063    }
064  }
065
066  @Override
067  public void onViewCreated(@NonNull android.view.View view, @Nullable Bundle savedInstanceState) {
068    super.onViewCreated(view, savedInstanceState);
069
070    signInViewModel = new ViewModelProvider(requireActivity()).get(SignInViewModel.class);
071
072    signInViewModel
073        .getCredential()
074        .observe(getViewLifecycleOwner(), (credential) -> {
075          if (credential == null) {
076            NavOptions options = new NavOptions.Builder()
077                .setPopUpTo(R.id.sign_in_fragment, true)
078                .build();
079            NavHostFragment.findNavController(this)
080                .navigate(R.id.sign_in_fragment, null, options);
081          }
082        });
083
084    signInViewModel
085        .getThrowable()
086        .observe(getViewLifecycleOwner(), (throwable) -> {
087          if (throwable != null) {
088            Toast.makeText(requireContext(), throwable.getLocalizedMessage(), Toast.LENGTH_SHORT)
089                .show();
090          }
091        });
092  }
093
094  private boolean isValidTemperature(Object newValue) {
095    String value = (newValue != null) ? newValue.toString().trim() : "";
096    if (value.isEmpty()) {
097      Toast.makeText(requireContext(), R.string.error_invalid_temperature, Toast.LENGTH_SHORT)
098          .show();
099      return false;
100    }
101    try {
102      Double.parseDouble(value);
103      return true;
104    } catch (NumberFormatException e) {
105      Toast.makeText(requireContext(), R.string.error_invalid_temperature, Toast.LENGTH_SHORT)
106          .show();
107      return false;
108    }
109  }
110
111  private boolean isValidHumidity(Object newValue) {
112    String value = (newValue != null) ? newValue.toString().trim() : "";
113    if (value.isEmpty()) {
114      Toast.makeText(requireContext(), R.string.error_invalid_humidity, Toast.LENGTH_SHORT)
115          .show();
116      return false;
117    }
118    try {
119      double humidity = Double.parseDouble(value);
120      if (humidity < 0 || humidity > 100) {
121        Toast.makeText(requireContext(), R.string.error_invalid_humidity, Toast.LENGTH_SHORT)
122            .show();
123        return false;
124      }
125      return true;
126    } catch (NumberFormatException e) {
127      Toast.makeText(requireContext(), R.string.error_invalid_humidity, Toast.LENGTH_SHORT)
128          .show();
129      return false;
130    }
131  }
132
133}
